summary: Superb ultramatrix recording captures a cataclysmic Dew performance in an excellent show.
review: The reviewer rates the concert a perfect five stars, calling it a great show with a "cataclysmic" Dew moment. They also praise the sound quality as superb, indicating a high‑fidelity ultramatrix source that reproduces the band clearly and powerfully.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review, but it is overwhelmingly positive about both performance and audio quality, warranting a high rating with low confidence due to limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the sound as superb; ultramatrix source suggests a clean blend of board and audience with great clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply notes an overall great performance.
